repair_record.sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(P.publication_date), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS year_start,
    AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT i.name)) OVER () AS avg_inventors_per_patent,
    COUNT(*) AS total_publications_ca
FROM 
    PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS P
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => P.inventor_harmonized) i
WHERE 
    i.country_code = 'CA'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(P.publication_date), 'YYYYMMDD'))
ORDER BY 
    year_start
